message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false

actor "Admin\nSAV Manager\nSAV Technician\nScooter Owner" as actor1
interface verifyEmail
circle VerificationController
circle User

activate actor1
actor1 -> verifyEmail : FillVerifyEmailForm(email,token)
deactivate actor1
verifyEmail --> actor1 : FormFilled
activate verifyEmail
verifyEmail -> verifyEmail : VerifyVerifyEmailForm(email,token)
deactivate verifyEmail
verifyEmail --> verifyEmail : FormVerified
deactivate verifyEmail
alt [FormVerified is true]
    activate verifyEmail
    verifyEmail -> VerificationController : verifyUser(email,code)
    activate VerificationController
    VerificationController -> User : verifyUser(email,code)
    deactivate VerificationController
    User --> VerificationController : user enabled
    deactivate User
    VerificationController --> verifyEmail : user enabled
    deactivate VerificationController
    deactivate verifyEmail
    verifyEmail --> actor1 : user enabled
    activate actor1
else [FormVerified is false]
    verifyEmail --> actor1 : showErrorMessage
end
@enduml
```
